text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I arrive at the training track to find it
much more crowded than usual.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well... we sure do have a lot of guests today.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No, it's fine. I'm used to this kind of clamor from
my races, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That said, it is much easier for me to focus when it's quiet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue with our training, but I can't help but
notice that Grass Wonder's running seems a bit
lackluster that day.
